theory.canonical_statement: ID5096 records Displacement Field as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `TZPID_exports\concept_clusters\concept_clusters\entries.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \(r=0\) (I used a simple 1-D model for an orbital phase). In a full 2-D vortex you?d see a smooth azimuthal phase winding \(e^{i\ell\theta}\)
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
\(r=0\) (I used a simple 1-D model for an orbital phase). In a full 2-D vortex you?d see a smooth azimuthal phase winding \(e^{i\ell\theta}\)
\]
